rules.rule_text:
rule AthenaHTTP
{
	meta:
		author = "Brian Wallace @botnet_hunter"
		author_email = "bwall@ballastsecurity.net"
		date = "2014-08-09"
		description = "Identify Athena HTTP"

	strings:
		$s1 = "%s(%s)"
		$s2 = "type:on_exec"
		$s3 = "uid:%s"
		$s4 = "priv:%s"
		$s5 = "arch:x%s"
		$s6 = "gend:%s"
		$s7 = "cores:%i"
		$s8 = "ver:%s"
		$s9 = "net:%s"

	condition:
		all of them
}
